$comment: Machine-readable per-tool output schemas for AgentToolPlugin. Read by the LLM (during workflow generation) and by WorkflowJsonValidator's tool_output_shape_mismatch rule. Add an entry here whenever a new agent tool ships with a stable, documented output shape. Tools not listed here are treated as 'shape unknown' — envelope check is skipped.

tools.name: decisionTableEvaluate
tools.summary: Evaluate a stored DMN-style decision table by name with structured inputs.

inputShape.tableName: string (exact name of the stored decision table)
inputShape.inputs: object (map of input-column-name -> value; missing inputs default to null)

outputShape.matched: boolean (whether at least one rule fired)
outputShape.outputs: object (merged output column values across all matched rules — later rules win for Collect hit-policy)

commonMistakes: Accessing .output (singular) — there is no such field. Use .outputs (plural) for the merged map.
Wrapping in an envelope: #result.output.outputs.<col> is wrong. AgentToolPlugin returns raw — start directly: #result.outputs.<col>.
Reading journeyType (or any column value) from the top level: #result.journeyType is null. The column value lives under .outputs.
